# DroidProxy

DroidProxy is a free, open-source macOS menu bar application that proxies authentication for AI coding tools including Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini.

## What DroidProxy Does

- One-click OAuth authentication for AI coding tools
- Routes requests through localhost proxy (port 8317)
- Injects adaptive thinking parameters automatically
- Per-model effort controls for Claude, GPT, and Gemini models
- Integrates with Factory.ai Droids

## Supported AI Providers

- Claude Code (Anthropic)
- Codex (OpenAI)
- Gemini (Google)

## Supported Models

- Claude Opus 4.7
- Claude Sonnet 4.6
- GPT 5.3 Codex
- GPT 5.4
- Gemini 3.1 Pro
- Gemini 3 Flash

## Technical Details

- Platform: macOS 13.0+
- Architecture: Apple Silicon optimized
- License: MIT
- Auto-updates: Sparkle

## Links

- Homepage: /
- GitHub: https://github.com/anand-92/droidproxy
- Releases: https://github.com/anand-92/droidproxy/releases
